global.title: Tesla launches Model 3 RWD in Canada at record-low $39,490 ($29,000 USD) from China
global.summary: Tesla has launched a new Model 3 Premium RWD trim in Canada starting at just $39,490 CAD — a record-low price for the electric sedan in the country. The price, which converts to roughly $29,000 USD, is made possible by sourcing the vehicle from Giga Shanghai instead of Fremont, California. The move

global.title: This solar farm lets cattle roam under moving panels
global.summary: Silicon Ranch has brought something online commercially that you don’t see every day: a utility-scale solar farm where cattle graze under moving panels. more…

global.title: Kia’s EV sales gain steam as it prepares to launch the EV3
global.summary: Kia is off to a record start in the US in 2026, led by strong demand for hybrid and electric vehicles. The three-row EV9 and EV6 gained momentum last month, but the EV3 will likely be Kia’s biggest hit yet. more…

global.title: Podcast: Tesla Semi is here, Xpeng VLA 2.0 test drive, Rivian earnings, and more
global.summary: In the Electrek Podcast, we discuss the most popular news in the world of sustainable transport and energy. In this week’s episode, we discuss Tesla Semi entering production, our Xpeng VLA 2.0 test drive, Rivian’s earnings, and more. more…

global.title: $1.4B saved: Massachusetts locks in cheaper offshore wind power
global.summary: Massachusetts has activated long-term contracts for Vineyard Wind, the state’s first utility-scale offshore wind project. Officials say the move will stabilize prices for 20 years and cut a projected $1.4 billion from customer electricity bills over that period. more…

global.title: ENGWE anniversary sale $1,048 savings, Lectric e-bikes get up to $793 savings, Segway Max G30P e-scooter $500 low, more
global.summary: We’re closing out this week’s Green Deals with an EV-packed edition, starting with ENGWE’s 12th Anniversary Sale that is offering up to $1,048 savings and bundled gear on three e-bikes, one of which is the new M20 3.0 Moped-Style e-bike with $248 in FREE gear starting from $1,399. Likewise, Lectric

global.title: BYD just sold its most expensive EV ever for nearly $3 million
global.summary: BYD’s 3,000 hp electric supercar, the Yangwang U9 Xtreme, sold for nearly $3 million at the Beijing Auto Show, making it the event’s highest-priced vehicle. more…

global.title: Tesla launches Basecharger for Semi, reveals $188,000 Megacharger
global.summary: Tesla has launched a new “Semi Charging for Business” program that allows fleet operators and businesses to purchase and install their own Megacharger and a brand-new product called the Basecharger — a lower-power 125 kW charger designed for depot and overnight use. The online configurator reveals a

global.title: The Hyundai IONIQ 5 is back with sales now up 11% in 2026
global.summary: Hyundai’s electric SUV remains a top seller in the US after sales rebounded quicker than expected. IONIQ 5 sales are now up 11% through April 2026. more…

global.title: Toyota’s 3-row electric SUV is gaining a luxury Lexus sibling: Here’s our first look [Images]
global.summary: Toyota’s luxury Lexus brand will unveil its first three-row electric SUV in less than a week. The higher-end sibling to the Highlander EV was spotted testing for the first time ahead of its debut. more…
